name: Five Layer Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 cup raisins, chopped dried apricots or miniature marshmallows
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Melt butter in a baking pan measuring 3x9x2 inches.
3. Remove the pan from the oven and stir together the crumbs, cocoa, and sugar, spreading them evenly over the melted butter.
4. Pour the sweetened condensed milk evenly over the crumb mixture.
5. Sprinkle chocolate chips and raisins (or miniature marshmallows) on top of the layer.
6. Add chopped nuts and press down firmly to ensure everything is well combined.
7. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until lightly browned.
8. Allow the bars to cool completely in the pan on a wire rack.
9. Cover with foil and let stand at room temperature for 6 to 8 hours before serving. Approximately 36 bars will be produced.
